title: At the Bank
opening: Hello. How can I help you?

t1.prompt: Hello. How can I help you?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello. (Heh-loh) How can I help you? (How kan ai help yoo?)

t2.prompt: You want to open an account. Do you have ID? Like a passport?
t2.promptTranslation: You want to open an account. (yoo want too oh-pen an ah-count) Do you have ID? (Doo yoo hav eye-dee?) Like a passport? (Laik ah pass-port?)

t3.prompt: You want to exchange money. What currency do you want? Dollars? Euros?
t3.promptTranslation: You want to exchange money. (yoo want too eks-chaynj muh-nee) What currency do you want? (Whaht kur-uhn-see doo yoo want?) Dollars? (Dah-lerz?) Euros? (Yoo-rohz?)

t4.prompt: You need help with ATM or PIN. Do you need a new PIN or ATM help?
t4.promptTranslation: You need help with ATM or PIN. (yoo need help with ay-tee-em or pin) Do you need a new PIN or ATM help? (Doo yoo need a noo pin or ay-tee-em help?)

t5.prompt: Great! Please come this way. We can open your account now.
t5.promptTranslation: Great! Please come this way. We can open your account now.

t6.prompt: No ID? I am sorry. You need ID to open an account. Please come back with ID.
t6.promptTranslation: No ID? I am sorry. You need ID to open an account. Please come back with ID.

t7.prompt: Okay. How much money do you want to exchange?
t7.promptTranslation: Okay. How much money do you want to exchange?

t8.prompt: Okay. Please go to desk three. They can help you.
t8.promptTranslation: Okay. Please go to desk three. They can help you.

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I do not understand. Can you say that again, please?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I do not understand. (Saw-ree, ai doo not un-der-stand) Can you say that again, please? (Kan yoo say that ah-gen, pleez?)

t-end.promptTranslation: Okay. Thank you. (Oh-kay. Thank yoo) Goodbye! (Good-bai!)
